overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a video game showing a character swimming across a forested river in a mountainous valley. The character moves steadily through the water from deep to shallow areas, eventually emerging onto a gravel shore surrounded by evergreen trees and rocky cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested river valley with rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily across the river toward the far bank, moving through deep water with a consistent breaststroke motion

entered.detail: deep green river water with gentle ripples and reflections
dense pine and fir trees lining the left riverbank
dense pine and fir trees lining the right riverbank
large rock formation and cliffs visible in the background across the river

segments.scene_description: The character swims through deep river water in a wide forested valley. Tall evergreen trees line both banks while rocky cliffs rise in the background under a partly cloudy sky. The water is calm with gentle ripples as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river approach with visible riverbed

events.description: water depth decreases significantly, revealing gravel riverbed beneath the surface

agents.ego_description: continuing to swim as the water becomes shallower, approaching the gravel shoreline

entered.detail: shallow water revealing pebbles and stones on the river bottom
sandy and pebble shoreline approaching on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the shore, the water becomes shallow enough to reveal the gravel riverbed below. The rocky cliffs shift to the left side of the frame while the right bank with its gravel shore draws closer. The forest remains dense on both sides.

events.description: character stops swimming and begins walking as the water becomes shallow enough to stand

agents.ego_description: standing up from the water and walking onto the gravel shore, leaving the river behind

entered.detail: wet gravel and pebble beach where the character exits the water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the shallow water onto a gravel shore. The camera follows closely as the character transitions from swimming to walking, with the river now behind and the forested bank immediately to the right. The rocky cliffs remain visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character swims through a deep river and gradually emerges onto a rocky shoreline. It begins with the character moving through calm, deep water in a wide forested valley, flanked by tall evergreen trees and distant rocky cliffs under a partly cloudy sky. As the character approaches the bank, the water shallows to reveal a gravel riverbed, shifting the perspective so the cliffs move to the left while the right shore draws closer. The scene then transitions as the character leaves the water and begins walking across the gravel, leaving the river behind. Finally, the camera follows the character inland toward the dense forest with the towering cliffs remaining visible in the far distance.
